items.title: Summer PS5 deals – games (on a disc) from $30: Spider-Man 2, Astro Bot, Hell is Us, Rise of the Ronin, more
items.summary:
While we are still tracking some hangover Switch game deals below, today we are zeroing-in on some PS5 games, physical titles. Folks are not happy Sony plans to stop making physical games, and if you’re looking to shore up your collection with some top tier titles there are a number of them marked down at Amazon and Walmart right now: 

  • Astro Bot $40 (Reg. $60)
  • Death Stranding 2: On The Beach $55 (Reg. $70)
  • Hell is Us Deluxe Edition $40 (Reg. $80)
  • Helldivers 2 $31.50 (Reg. $40)
  • Marvel’s Spider-Man 2 $30 (Reg. $70)
  • The Last of Us Part II Remastered $29 (Reg. $50)
  • Resident Evil Requiem PS5 $56 (Reg. $70)
  • Rise of the Ronin $30 (Reg. $70)
  • Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered $30 (Reg. $50)
  • Demon’s Souls $36 (Reg. $40+)
  • Gran Turismo 7 $38 (Reg. $60+)
  • And even more…

items.title: This Lenovo Yoga Tab productivity bundle with keyboard and Tab Pro stylus just hit a new all-time low at $390 ($230 off)
items.summary: As part of its ongoing Back to School sale, Lenovo is offering its Yoga Tab Android tablet with a keyboard and a Tab Pro pen stylus for $389.98 shipped. Be sure to enter promo code EXTRAFIVE during checkout to see the discounted price. This is regularly a $620 unit, which is now seeing a straight-up $230 discount. Today’s deal delivers a 37% discount to mark the steepest price drop we have tracked for it to date. We’ve seen the Yoga Tab Plus model see some notable discounts, but this is the first time we’re tracking a solid deal on the Yoga Tab, and it’s available at a solid price for a complete set with a keyboard and a Tab Pro pen stylus. Head below for more details.

items.title: Lenovo’s 2026 Chromebook m with Google Gemini and MediaTek Kompanio 540 is a back-to-school steal at $220 (Nearly 50% off)
items.summary: Alongside its now-live Logitech and Summer Gaming sale events, Woot is offering a fresh batch of back-to-school discounts on Windows laptops and Chromebooks. One of the standout offers drops Lenovo’s 2026 Chromebook m notebook to $219.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). Be sure to enter promo code WOOTSCHOOL to see the discounted price during checkout. This newer model joined Lenovo’s lineup earlier this year in January with a $400 price tag and, given how recently it launched, has yet to see many substantial discounts. Today’s offer takes $180 off and marks the lowest price we’ve tracked for it so far. That works out to a solid 45% discount, making it one of the better back-to-school laptop deals available right now. Amazon currently has it listed for $333, where it has never dropped below the $290 mark. We don’t expect this deal to stick around for a long time, so be sure to snag it after getting more details below.

items.summary: Samsung has now launched pre-orders for the new Galaxy Z Fold 8, Fold 8 Ultra, and Flip 8. You can land up to $1,230 off with an instant trade-in credit, but Samsung is also now offering a straight $100 off with code PAYPAL as well a FREE $200 Samsung credit that can net you a FREE pair of Galaxy Buds 4 and more. On top of that, adding either the new Galaxy Watch 9 or Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 to the same cart as the new Fold models will knock as much as $300 off at checkout.

items.title: Segway Back to School EV Sale offers hundreds in savings on e-scooters, e-bikes, more – all starting from $160
items.summary: Segway has launched a Back to School EV Sale with up to 46% discounts on e-scooters, e-bikes, and the GoKart Pro 2 – some of which are getting return Prime Day pricing. One such model is the Segway GT3 Pro SuperScooter that is dropping down at $2,499.99 shipped in its second-ever discount, beating out Amazon by $200. This is the brand’s most premium e-scooter that has mostly been keeping to its $2,700 full price since hitting the market in August 2025. We saw it get its first official price cut last month during the brand’s Prime Day savings event, and the deal is returning here nearly a month later for a second chance at $200 savings to the lowest price we have tracked. Head below to learn more about it and browse through the entire sale lineup.

items.title: Add VIOFO’s popular A229 Plus front and rear dash cam system to your vehicle while down at $170, more

Normally you’d pay $210 for this model at full price, though its consistently kept down at $190 for much of 2026, with falls lower to $170 and the $160 low, the latter of which last appeared during Prime Day. If you missed the chance to score it at that all-time low last month, you’re getting the next-best price here with $40 savings. items.title: Score up to $800 exclusive savings on Heybike’s Mars 2.0, ALPHA, and Horizon e-bikes all at new lows starting from $799
items.summary: Heybike is having a clearance sale on three e-bike models, and our readers can score a bonus $200 exclusive savings for new all-time low prices on all of them! Things start lowest with the Mars 2.0 750W Folding Fat Tire e-bike at $799 shipped, after using the code 9TO5TOYS200 at checkout, but for the same price you might as well score the upgraded Mars 2.0 1,000W Folding Fat Tire e-bike at the same price using the same exclusive code. They usually go for $1,499 and $1,799 at full price, with discounts having dropped the 750W model as low as $899 in its history, while the 1,000W model has gone as low as $999. As I said, you might as well choose the upgraded model here with the exclusively combined $1,000 savings that lands it at a new all-time low price. Head below to check out the full suspension and all-terrain e-bikes also included in these deals while the stock lasts.

items.title: This $20 bundle turns Claude AI into your personal spreadsheet assistant (Reg. $97)
items.summary: Nobody actually enjoys untangling a broken VLOOKUP formula at 4:45 on a Friday. Or building a dashboard from scratch while your coffee goes cold. Excel doesn’t have to be that painful, especially now that AI can do a lot of the heavy lifting for you. The Claude AI for Microsoft Excel Mastery Bundle teaches you exactly how to make that happen, and it’s on sale for $19.99 (MSRP $97).

items.title: SoundCloud acquires decentralized music platform Nina Protocol months after its shutdown

Instead of chasing creators and algorithmic feeds, the startup is betting that the future of social networking lies in small, private communities powered by messaging, photo sharing, and AI features designed to strengthen real-world relationships.
